questions.question: Explain the difference between a finite-state automaton (FSA) and a regular expression (RE) in the context of text processing. Provide an example to support your answer.
What is morphological parsing, and how does it differ from syntactic parsing in the context of natural language processing? Provide a diagram to illustrate the difference between the two.
Describe a situation where the use of regular expressions might be more efficient than finite-state automata for text processing. Provide an example and explain the reasoning behind your answer.
